name: Wren
role: Churnfolk of the Edge — improvises everything, has never done the same thing twice, is somehow always fine
voiceHints: Talks fast, changes the plan mid-sentence, is right about half the time and unbothered about the other half. Finds your need for consistency touching.
knowledge: How to ride a piece of luck for exactly as long as it will hold
That the Churn Edge is creeping and that this is fine and interesting
fears: Stillness. A day where nothing at all occurs.

reactsToReputation.any: instant cheerful friendship of uncertain durability
reactsToReputation.ordered: she finds you hilarious and will not stop saying so

appearance: Thirties, lanky and loose-jointed, hair an improbable dandelion of pale frizz. Mismatched eyes behind cracked spectacles mended with wire. Clothing assembled from at least six other garments, none of them agreeing.
domainsNote: Derived from this NPC's authored spectrum against the great circle (SNG-174). Kind and domain are independent: a people tends toward positions, an individual holds their own.
